message:
🐛 Remove duplicate kubeconfig watcher methods

Remove duplicate implementations of SetOnReload, StartWatching, and
StopWatching methods from MultiClusterClient. Keep the more sophisticated
version with debouncing and directory watching for atomic saves.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
